title: The Block Battle Reaches Its Climax
description: Pages 1–4 focus on the block battle reaches its climax, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Zoro, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #2 as the Colosseum block battle reaches a brutal finish, setting up the tournament’s next stage and sharpening Luffy’s path toward the fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Fishman Karate Master, "100th Degree Black Belt Hack"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even though we were supporting him, he lost to that chicken-headed bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gats-san, you've got to report this with- out bias!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's still hard to say who the winner will be!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I remember to be sure I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GAMAHAHA... everyone's good and wounded!! ...this is the perfect time

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: skilled fighters are falling, one after the other!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Even the mysterious gladiator, Ricky, won't see his ambi- Tions come to light!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Looks like I can't win... against the ravages of time...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What did you hope to cut with a bladeless sword!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The numbers have really thinned, thanks to Da- game's plan

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WHEN HE GIVES THE SIGN, WE'LL BREAK THIS FORMATION!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Now, we just have to let the true winner...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't lose your positions!! How were you brought down from behind!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If it's compensation you're looking for, you'll get it later!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I was assigned as the "Dog Hunter"....

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on the block battle reaches its climax, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
